methodology: 300-issue sample from 968 total open issues, ordered by updatedAt DESC. Health classification based on updatedAt recency.

critical_items.title: agents.db backup races with concurrent writes — corrupted restores
critical_items.impact: Users syncing via Nutstore/WebDAV backup lose agents/sessions silently

critical_items.title: CherryIN OAuth flow can be completed by a different renderer sender
critical_items.status: open (FIX SHIPPED in v1.9.11 via PR #15410)
critical_items.note: Issue remains open despite being fixed — should be closed

critical_items.title: @cherrystudio/ai-core CJS/type exports point to missing dist files
critical_items.impact: CommonJS consumers and TypeScript declaration resolution broken for published package

critical_items.title: MCP/Skill references in Agent SOUL.md lack automatic validation after deletion

active_p1_issues.title: [Bug]: xiaomi mimo response only displays the last line
[Bug]: [AI_APICallError: Resource not found, default use responses API]

recommendations: Close #15409 — OAuth fix is already shipped in v1.9.11
Escalate #15316 (agents.db backup corruption) — active data integrity issue in milestone v1.9.8
Triage #15826 (@cherrystudio/ai-core CJS exports) — affects external package consumers
Review 102 inactive-labeled open issues — many could be closed
Add P1/severity labels to #15316 and #15826 to make triage easier
